parsed.production_notes: The video features human actors with natural expressions and movements. Lighting and environment appear authentic, with no typical AI-generated artifacts like uncanny faces or static cuts.

characters.appearance: A man in his late 20s to early 30s, with a medium build and dark complexion. He has a full, dark beard and mustache, and dark, curly hair. His eyes are dark.
characters.wardrobe: A grey marled short-sleeved t-shirt with a subtle pattern. He wears a simple silver chain with a small pendant and a red thread bracelet on his right wrist.
characters.demeanor: Initially stressed and pleading while on the phone, his expression shifts to more understanding and helpful when interacting with the passenger.

characters.appearance: A woman in her late 20s to early 30s, with a medium build and light-medium complexion. She has dark, straight hair pulled back, and wears glasses.
characters.wardrobe: A dark patterned kurta (Indian tunic) with a light, possibly white or cream, pattern.
characters.demeanor: Initially concerned and slightly frustrated, her expression becomes more relieved and communicative as the conversation progresses.

scenes.setting: Interior of a car, daytime. The car has brown leather seats. The blurred background outside the window suggests a dry, light-colored, possibly rural landscape.

panels.panel_visual_description: A man (Character A) is seated in the driver's seat of a car, seen from a medium close-up, angled slightly from the passenger side. The scene is entirely in black and white. He holds a phone to his right ear with his right hand, his elbow resting on the center console. His expression is one of concern and slight desperation, with his brow furrowed and mouth slightly open as if speaking earnestly. The car's interior features brown leather seats and a light-colored headliner. The background outside the window is blurred, showing indistinct light-colored terrain.

A man (Character A) is seated in the driver's seat of a car, seen from a medium close-up, angled slightly from the passenger side. The scene is in full color. He holds a light blue smartphone to his right ear with his right hand, his elbow resting on the center console. His expression is one of concern and slight desperation, with his brow furrowed and mouth slightly open as if speaking earnestly. The car's interior features rich brown leather seats and a light-colored headliner. The background outside the window is blurred, showing indistinct light-colored terrain under bright daylight.

scenes.visual_description: The screen is split horizontally. The top panel shows Character A in black and white, talking on a phone, looking distressed. The bottom panel shows the same shot of Character A in color, talking on a light blue phone, also looking distressed. Text overlays 'before' and 'After' are at the top left of each panel respectively. Subtitles in English and Telugu appear at the bottom of each panel, translating Character A's speech.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: Please cancel cheyakandi sir. [Please don't cancel, sir.]
Character A says: Idi naa first ride. [This is my first ride.]
Character A says: 200 Rupees loss avuthundi Sir, please. [I will lose 200 Rupees, sir, please.]
Character A says: Sir, don't cancel my ride. I have been waiting since morning. This is my first ride.

scenes.audio_transcript:
Character B says: అన్నా, I have changed the route. Please check your app. [Anna, I have changed the route. Please check your app.]
Character A says: Ma'am, English... No. [Ma'am, English... No.]
Character A says: No English, ma'am.
Character B says: అన్నా, I want to change my drop location. [Anna, I want to change my drop location.]
Character A says: Of course ma'am. Please change it in the app.
